_meta.description: Pixel art generation prompts for gameapp monsters, projectiles, backgrounds, and hero
_meta.style_prefix: pixelsprite, side view facing right, single character, dark fantasy tone
_meta.idle_suffix: idle standing pose, feet on ground, white background, centered
_meta.attack_suffix: same character, attack action pose, weapon swing, body stretched forward, one arm or claw extended, slash arc effect, motion lines, dynamic action, white background, centered
_meta.common_negative: blurry, realistic, 3d, photo, high resolution, watermark, signature, multiple characters, cropped, lowres, jpeg artifacts, front facing, looking at viewer, portrait, face close-up, aura, glow, particles, energy effect, lightning effect, flame effect, magical aura, elemental glow

size_prompts.small: tiny cute creature, very small round body, simple design, 16x16
size_prompts.medium: medium creature, visible limbs, balanced proportions, 24x24
size_prompts.large: large imposing creature, bulky body, armored or scaled, 32x32
size_prompts.extraLarge: massive boss creature, towering body, epic presence, 48x48

rarity_detail.1: very simple shape, 2-3 flat colors, minimal shading, no special effects
rarity_detail.2: simple shape, 3-4 flat colors, light cel shading, subtle accent color
rarity_detail.3: moderate detail, 4-5 colors, cel shading, subtle accent highlights
rarity_detail.4: detailed design, 5-6 colors, cel shading, ornamental details
rarity_detail.5: elaborate design, 6-8 colors, strong cel shading, golden trim, intricate patterns
